name: scheduleShoot
invariants: output.result.locations === undefined || output.result.locations.every(l => Number.isFinite(l.scenes) && Number.isFinite(l.estimatedDays) && l.estimatedDays >= 0 && Array.isArray(l.cast))
_note: film-studios.scheduleShoot is a PURE grouping calculator (LENS_ACTIONS / domains/filmstudios.js, input under artifact.data, reads data.scenes). It buckets scenes by location, estimates days = ceil(sceneCount/3), weeks = ceil(days/5), and unions cast per location. No DB / no money. Empty or missing scenes degrade gracefully to { message: 'Add scenes …' } (never throws). avgScenesPerDay divides by totalShootDays which is >= 1 whenever scenes is non-empty (every location yields >= 1 estimatedDay via ceil), so no divide-by-zero / non-finite output is reachable. scenes is declared `array` (not numeric) — there are no numeric params for the assassin to poison; robustness is pinned by the empty/missing/location-less fuzz cases.
